scripts.make: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.cjs --publish never
scripts.make:mac: npm run build && electron-builder --mac --config electron-builder.cjs --publish never
scripts.make:win: npm run build && electron-builder --win --config electron-builder.cjs --publish never
scripts.make:linux: npm run build && electron-builder --linux --config electron-builder.cjs --publish never
